CIPHER.370.cipherString: Where I once constantly lost my temper, I found myself arriving at a crisis and experiencing peace.
CIPHER.370.question: Your lab partner discovered this pattern on the back of a graphing calculator. It's a quote by Josh McDowell, encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.370.author: Josh McDowell

CIPHER.355.cipherString: Any achievement depends on diligence of the desire.
CIPHER.355.question: Scrawled in dry-erase marker on the whiteboard after hours: this Baconian encoded quote by Lailah Gifty Akita. What does it say?
CIPHER.355.author: Lailah Gifty Akita

CIPHER.348.cipherString: Besides the fact that I make movies, there's nothing interesting about my life at all, unfortunately.
CIPHER.348.question: A phrase by Jonah Hill has been encoded as an Aristocrat Cipher with a K2 alphabet. What was the K2 Key Phrase used to encode it?
CIPHER.348.author: Jonah Hill

CIPHER.365.cipherString: Pure and complete sorrow is as impossible as pure and complete joy.
CIPHER.365.question: A time-capsule USB drive from 1983 just auto-opened with this Nihilist Substitution-encrypted message by Leo Tolstoy with a keyword of SIGNAL and Polybius key of ARGUMENTS. What does it say?
CIPHER.365.author: Leo Tolstoy

CIPHER.342.cipherString: La honestidad es la mejor política; pero el que se rige por esa máxima no es un hombre honrado.
CIPHER.342.question: Upon searching a room, the following were found on scraps of paper. You are told it's a quote by Richard Whately encoded as a Xenocrypt in Spanish using a K2 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.342.author: Richard Whately
CIPHER.342.translation: Honesty is the best policy; but he who is governed by that maxim is not an honest man.

CIPHER.363.cipherString: No government agrees with another government on everything.
CIPHER.363.question: Kenneth Francis Hackett offers us some advice that has been encoded as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of EMPATHY and Polybius key of NEIGHBORS. What does it say?
CIPHER.363.author: Kenneth Francis Hackett

CIPHER.354.cipherString: By the end of my second term we will have the first permanent base on the moon and it will be American.
CIPHER.354.question: You intercepted this transmission from a rogue weather balloon. Decode the Aristocrat version of Newt Gingrich's famous words. You are told that the cipher contains the word THE thrice. What does it say?
CIPHER.354.author: Newt Gingrich

CIPHER.357.cipherString: Be unique. Tread smart. Stay original. Keep being YOU. Don't allow anyone tell you otherwise.
CIPHER.357.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on a classroom poster. It turns out to be a quote by P.C. Clotter, encrypted using a Checkerboard with a Polybius key of EUPHORIC. What does it say?
CIPHER.357.author: P.C. Clotter

CIPHER.352.cipherString: Mis amigos no parecen ser amigos en absoluto, sino personas cuyos números de teléfono no he perdido.
CIPHER.352.question: Your lab partner's retainer case clicked open to reveal this Xenocrypt-encrypted quote by Nick Hornby in Spanish using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.352.author: Nick Hornby
CIPHER.352.translation: my friends don't seem to be friends at all but people whose phone numbers I haven't lost.

CIPHER.349.question: A message in a bottle washed up in the school's decorative fountain which you recognize as a Cryptarithm. What do the values 021316 5240 86768 decode to?

CIPHER.359.cipherString: Time is the worst kind of thief, sneaky and effective and gone before you realize what's been taken.
CIPHER.359.question: You open a forgotten email draft saved in the school's computer system. It holds a quote by Isabel Ibañez encoded in an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.359.author: Isabel Ibañez

CIPHER.362.cipherString: I would like to be judged on the validity of my arguments, not as a victim.
CIPHER.362.question: You discover a scrap of paper tucked inside an old lab notebook. It contains a quote by Ayaan Hirsi Ali encoded as a Checkerboard. The deciphered text starts with IWOULDL. What does it say?
CIPHER.362.author: Ayaan Hirsi Ali

CIPHER.341.cipherString: Every couple is not a pair.
CIPHER.341.question: Hidden inside the fortune cookie was a Proverb encoded using a Hill cipher with a keyword of INTO. What does it say?
CIPHER.341.author: Proverb

CIPHER.356.cipherString: Humanity needs dreams to be able to survive the miseries of daily existence, even if only for an instant.
CIPHER.356.question: Someone left this encrypted quote scribbled on the chalkboard before class began. It's a quote by Oscar Niemeyer, written as an Aristocrat. You are told that the cipher contains the word TO twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.356.author: Oscar Niemeyer

CIPHER.358.cipherString: Ghosts visit only those who look for them.
CIPHER.358.question: A message flashes briefly on a malfunctioning computer screen. It turns out to be a quote by Holtei written in a Baconian. You are told that the deciphered text starts with GHOS. What does it say?
CIPHER.358.author: Holtei

CIPHER.369.cipherString: Only when one has lost all curiosity about the future has one reached the age to write an autobiography.
CIPHER.369.question: A weathered note is found inside an old science textbook. The writing appears to be a quote by Evelyn Waugh encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.369.author: Evelyn Waugh

CIPHER.343.cipherString: Organizationally what is required - and evolving - is systems management.
CIPHER.343.question: Projected by a broken laser pointer during physics class, solve this Nihilist Substitution quote from Peter Drucker with a keyword length of 4. The 31st through 41st cipher units (75 56 66 65 96 47 57 83 65 56 56) decode to be ANDEVOLVING. What does it say?
CIPHER.343.author: Peter Drucker

CIPHER.364.cipherString: We stand like a race with shrunken muscles, staring helplessly at the weights our forefathers easily lifted.
CIPHER.364.question: During a field trip, you notice these strange markings on a metal plaque. They represent a quote by Henry James, encoded using an Aristocrat Cipher using a K1 alphabet. What was the K1 Key Phrase used to encode it?
CIPHER.364.author: Henry James

CIPHER.360.cipherString: Economy forced me to become a vegetarian, but I finally starting liking it.
CIPHER.360.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote by A.P.J. Abdul Kalam, encrypted with a Porta. The 17th through 23rd cipher characters (FXUWION) decode to be OBECOME. What does it say?
CIPHER.360.author: A.P.J. Abdul Kalam

CIPHER.346.cipherString: The systems approach goes on to discovering that every world-view is terribly restricted.
CIPHER.346.question: Your microscope slide prep strangely revealed this Aristocrat message. What does it say?

CIPHER.347.question: You receive this cryptic message from the future through an online time capsule. It's a quote by Bertrand Russell, written in a Hill with a keyword of TEMPORARY. What does it say?
CIPHER.347.author: Bertrand Russell

CIPHER.344.cipherString: We must fall back upon the old axiom that when all other contingencies fail, whatever remains, however improbable, must be the truth.
CIPHER.344.question: A famous phrase by Sherlock Holmes has been encoded as a Patristocrat cipher using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher starts with WEM. What does it say?
CIPHER.344.author: Sherlock Holmes

CIPHER.368.cipherString: There are worse crimes than burning books. One of them is not reading them.
CIPHER.368.question: Hidden in the margin of a library book on black holes: decode this Porta version of Ray Bradbury using a keyword of GRAPHS. What does it say?
CIPHER.368.author: Ray Bradbury

CIPHER.366.cipherString: A gift is as a precious stone in the eyes of him that hath it.
CIPHER.366.question: You find a coded sequence scratched into the surface of a lab stool. It turns out to be a quote by Gemstone, written in a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.366.author: Gemstone

CIPHER.351.cipherString: Stop making excuses of why you can't or how hard it is and start making your life matter.
CIPHER.351.question: The janitor found this strange paper strip under a Bunsen burner. It's a quote by John Patrick Hickey, encoded with a Checkerboard Cipher with a Polybius key of SCHEDULING. What does it say?
CIPHER.351.author: John Patrick Hickey

CIPHER.361.question: You find this encoded line written in invisible ink on a lab safety poster. It's a quote, written in a Cryptarithm. What do the values 748 9568 01324 decode to?

CIPHER.350.cipherString: He feels like a handle broken off a jug, but the jug doesn't know its broken and keeps going to the well.
CIPHER.350.question: Someone has left a coded message on the classroom 3D printer's display. You’re told it's a quote by Wisława Szymborska, written in an Aristocrat Cipher using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.350.author: Wisława Szymborska

CIPHER.367.cipherString: That is the great difficulty in not having an opening speech. If there is a speech without any observations, I think it beneficial.
CIPHER.367.question: Your school's intercom crackled to life with static… then spelled out this Patristocrat message by J. Parke using a K2 alphabet. You are told that the cipher ends with IAL. What does it say?
CIPHER.367.author: J. Parke

CIPHER.353.cipherString: For this reason poetry is something more philosophical and more worthy of serious attention than history.
CIPHER.353.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote by Aristotle, written in a Complete Columnar. The quote has ETRYI somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.353.author: Aristotle

CIPHER.345.cipherString: You didnt lose your power; you GAVE it away. It won't come back on its own; you must TAKE it back!
CIPHER.345.question: Someone left this coded message in the school lab. You are told it's a quote by Steve Maraboli encoded with a Complete Columnar. The quote has POWER somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.345.author: Steve Maraboli
